# ready

**Type Property**

A status that represents a ready container with no error.

## Declaration

```swift
class var ready: FSContainerStatus { get }
```

## Discussion

This value is a [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSContainerStatus] with a [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSContainerStatus/state] that is [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSContainerStatus/ready], and a [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSContainerStatus/status] that is `nil`.

## Using common status values

- **active**: A status that represents an active container with no error.
